summary: Recent Computer Science graduate from Monash University specializing in Data Science with a 3.81 GPA. Experienced in building ETL pipelines, interactive dashboards, and full-stack applications. Proven track record in data analysis through internship at Veve Clothing where I optimized inventory and sales tracking. Passionate about turning data into actionable insights.

highlights: Principal's Merit Award for outstanding academic performance

experience.title: Data Analyst Intern (Operations & Sales)
highlights: Designed and maintained Excel-based data models and dashboards to analyse sales performance, inventory turnover, and demand patterns
Automated stock and sales tracking workflows using Excel formulas and structured datasets, reducing manual processing time and improving reporting accuracy
Analysed historical sales and inventory data to identify inefficiencies and optimise replenishment decisions, contributing to improved stock availability
Leveraged social media and campaign performance data to evaluate marketing effectiveness and inform targeting strategies

projects.name: DataPraktis Marketplace Platform
projects.description: Full-stack marketplace connecting SMBs with data analysts
highlights: Building a full-stack marketplace using Next.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL
Designed analyst-client matching logic, role-based access control, and project workflows
Integrated secure escrow-style payments via Midtrans API and developed admin tools

projects.name: NBA Player Ranking Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive analytics dashboard addressing biases in basketball rankings
highlights: Built an interactive NBA analytics dashboard using Flask, R, MongoDB, and JavaScript
Designed a statistical ranking model using z-score normalization, PCA, and weighted metrics
Automated R-based ETL pipelines to ingest and process live NBA data
Deployed the application using Docker, Git, and Agile practices

projects.name: Data Visualization of Australia's Weather
projects.description: Interactive climate trends visualization using geospatial and time-series data
highlights: Built a lightweight ETL pipeline to extract public climate and GIS datasets, clean and transform data using R
Built interactive analytical dashboards using Vega-Lite and Vega, combining geospatial and time-series visualisations
Analysed environmental trends including bushfire hotspots and koala habitat distribution

projects.name: MonEquip Data Warehousing
projects.description: End-to-end data warehouse with star schema design
highlights: Designed an end-to-end data warehouse using a star schema with fact and dimension tables
Implemented SCD Type 2 and temporal modelling to preserve historical pricing and attribute changes
Performed advanced SQL analytics using ROLLUP, CUBE, and window functions
Built a Power BI dashboard and analytical poster to communicate insights

projects.name: Crypto Pulse
projects.description: Cryptocurrency portfolio tracker with sentiment analysis and predictions
highlights: Built a cryptocurrency portfolio tracker with sentiment analysis
Implemented fantasy league and prediction features

projects.name: Community Oracle Network
projects.description: Prediction platform where accuracy determines influence
highlights: Built a platform where users make predictions and accurate predictors gain more influence
